headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Keurig Dr Pepper, Lowers Price Target to $37
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $40 to $37.
